appmesh.gatewayroute.httpgatewayroute.Cf: An object that represents an HTTP gateway route.

appmesh.gatewayroute.httpgatewayroute.Ac.Description: An object that represents the action to take if a match is determined.

appmesh.gatewayroute.httpgatewayroute.Ma.Description: An object that represents the criteria for determining a request match.
